## What it does

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
Discovers and runs non-mutating host checks for changed prompt-engineering artifacts, returning Pass, Fail, or Deferred. Dispatched by hve-builder.
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
